subject: Mozi Minute: Why You Should Sell 1-on-1 Time
body:
Words I like: "This is America, everything is for sale!"

Mozi Minute: Why You Should Sell 1-on-1 Time

Most people think selling your time 1-on-1 is unscalable and beneath them.

They're wrong.

It's actually the fastest way to get started and the highest margin business you can run.

The Core Principle:

Either sell extremely expensive stuff to a select few OR sell super cheap to everyone.

The middle is where businesses die.

When starting out, go expensive.

Tesla started with a $250,000 Roadster, then worked down to the Model 3.

Same strategy works for you.

Why Sell Your Time:

- You Learn Faster
- Wealthy People Shift Your Beliefs
- Everyone Already Sells Their Time
- You Keep 100% Margin
- It Anchors Your Other Offers

Money Math:

Let's say 90 people buy at $100 and 10 people buy at $1,000.

If you make 40% margin on the $100 tier:
- 90 x $100 x 40% = $3,600 profit

If you make 100% margin on the $1,000 tier:
- 10 x $1,000 x 100% = $10,000 profit

Result: The expensive tier with only 10% of customers generates 75% of your profit.

How To Create Your Expensive Offer:

Framework 1: 10-100x Your Current Price
Framework 2: Word of Mouth Only
Framework 3: Remove Unscalable, 10x Value

Implementation:

List your premium offer wherever you sell.

When you present it, confront the high price head-on:

"Working with me 1-on-1 is $10,000. This is the fastest way to get you where you want to go."

Then shut up. Let them respond.

Bottom Line:

Every business can have 5 premium 1-on-1 clients.

Cap the supply. Charge accordingly.

Crush it.

- Alex
